markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's potential collaboration with Zapier to programmatically create and optimize templates for SEO and user activation.](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on refreshing existing Zap templates (500k-600k) as the primary work stream](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Explore creating new AI by Zapier templates as a secondary priority](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Aim to improve template specificity, field mapping, and overall user experience](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Validate changes through Zapier's API and CMS (Payload) for efficient scaling](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

## Topics

### Current Template Landscape

  - [Zapier has 500k-600k existing templates generated from customer data](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Many templates lack depth, specificity, and proper field mapping](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Two main types: legacy Zap templates and newer AI by Zapier templates](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Moving away from two-step Zaps and app directory pages towards more complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)

### Proposed Workflow for Template Optimization

  - [Access template data through Zapier's API and CMS (Payload)](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Programmatically update and create new templates](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Submit changes to a moderation queue for review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Validate template functionality before pushing live](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

### Key Metrics and Goals

  - [Increase template page traffic and "Try It" click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Improve template activation rates (currently ranging from 2% to 40%)](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Aim for 40% conversion rate on verticalized template variants](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### AI by Zapier Templates

  - [Priority to create full, determinate workflows (trigger, AI step, action)](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Leverage existing popular AI templates to create AI by Zapier versions](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Add missing action steps to incomplete two-step AI templates](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Need access to internal API for available fields, triggers, and actions](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
  - [Potential automation of related template suggestions based on URL similarity](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
  - [Manual creation of template landing pages, but potential for automation](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare initial proposal for phase one (existing template refresh) and phase two (new AI template creation)](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Kirkland to conduct further technical due diligence if needed](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Tyler to coordinate with Kaveh on proposal review meeting attendees](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Zapier to provide GrowthX with necessary API access and CMS accounts](https://fathom.video/share/NFRgxB3sqzy8cubKgnxpVxV-nqb4vjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
